properties.name: idempotency.key-header
properties.description: HTTP header name used to carry the idempotency key.

properties.name: idempotency.default-ttl
properties.description: Default time-to-live for stored idempotency records. After this duration, records become eligible for purging.

properties.name: idempotency.default-lock-timeout
properties.description: Maximum duration to wait when acquiring a lock for an in-flight idempotency key.

properties.name: idempotency.filter-order
properties.description: Order of the idempotency servlet filter in the filter chain. Lower values execute earlier.

properties.name: idempotency.purge.enabled
properties.description: Whether automatic purging of expired idempotency records is enabled.

properties.name: idempotency.purge.cron
properties.description: Cron expression controlling how often expired idempotency records are purged.
